    <item>
        <guid>nba528317</guid>
        <title>Chet Holmgren: Full stat line in win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/chet-holmgren-5697</link>
        <description>Holmgren tallied 30 points (10-13 FG, 3-4 3Pt, 7-10 FT), 14 rebounds, five assists, four blocks and two steals across 31 minutes in Wednesday's 128-110 win over the Clippers.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Wed, 08 Apr 2026 9:42:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba528316</guid>
        <title>Jalen Green: Doesn't return Wednesday</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/jalen-green-5230</link>
        <description>Green (knee) exited Wednesday's 112-107 win over the Mavericks in the first quarter and did not return, finishing with zero points (0-2 FG, 0-1 3Pt) and one rebound in four minutes.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Wed, 08 Apr 2026 9:26:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba528315</guid>
        <title>Nikola Jokic: Triple-doubles in win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/nikola-jokic-3612</link>
        <description>Jokic notched 14 points (5-8 FG, 0-1 3Pt, 4-5 FT), 16 rebounds, 10 assists and two steals across 31 minutes in Wednesday's 136-119 win over Memphis.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Wed, 08 Apr 2026 9:20:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba528314</guid>
        <title>Paolo Banchero: Paces Orlando in win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/paolo-banchero-5700</link>
        <description>Banchero contributed 20 points (8-11 FG, 1-1 3Pt, 3-5 FT), eight rebounds, six assists and one steal in 29 minutes during Wednesday's 132-120 win over Minnesota.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Wed, 08 Apr 2026 9:13:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba528313</guid>
        <title>Jericho Sims: Logs first career triple-double</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/jericho-sims-5389</link>
        <description>Sims supplied 11 points (3-6 FG, 5-8 FT), 11 rebounds, 10 assists and two steals across 39 minutes in Wednesday's 137-111 loss to the Pistons.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Wed, 08 Apr 2026 8:59:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
